text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ohauer

Log:
  - fix build against openssl 1.x
  - do not add /etc/service entries during install
  - add helper script to add /etc/services entries
  - remove unused pkg-deinstall
  - portlint

  Submitted by:	Maxime Soule
  Reported by:	many
